SUMMONS ISSUED TO CROSS COMPLAINANT SOTHEBY'S INC ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS "SOTHEBY'S"

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT RULED ON DEFENDANT SOTHEBY'S INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER DISCHARGING DEFT STAKEHOLDER FROM LIABILITY AWARDING COSTS AND FEES AND DISMISSAL -- (1) THE RING SHOULD BE RETURNED TO S. F. AND DEPOSITED WITH THE COURT. (2) ACTION STAYED AS TO DEFENDANT SOTHEBY'S INC. (3) THE RULING ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS DEFERRED UNTIL FINAL JUDGMENT IS ENTERED. DEFENDANT SOTHEBY'S INC. IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. (PHA/301/DR) REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220

ORDER GRANTING RELEASE (OF THE RING), PLAINTIFF ROBERT ROMER'S MOTION

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF ROBERT R. ROMER'S MOTION FOR ORDER RELEASING RING -- (1) MOTION RELEASING GRANTED PROVIDED PARTIES ARE SATISFIED SIERRA FOOD BANK HAS QUITCLAIMED ITS INTEREST IN THE RING. (2) AFTER RING RELEASED SOTHEBY'S NO LONGER HAS ANY RESPONSIBILITIES ASSOCIATED WITH PHYSICAL POSSESSION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR# 8620.

Motion For Order Relesing Ring
Off Calendar Sep-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoffrey M. Faust, Esq., 925/673-1988, for plaintiff Robert R. Romer, moving for order releasing ring

RULING:
Upon plaintiff's representation, the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF ROBERT R. ROMER'S Motion For Order Releasing Ring -- (1) Motion releasing granted provided parties are satisfied Sierra Food Bank has quitclaimed its interest in the ring. (2) After ring released Sotheby's no longer has any responsibilities associated with physical possession. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-06-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2003 Text Ruling

For Order Discharging Deft Stakeholder From Liability Awarding Costs And Fees And Dismissal; Declarations Of Kim Zeldin, Michael Dupin, And Jennifer Foley Biederbeck
Off Calendar May-22-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kim S. Zeldin, Esq. of LINER, YANKELEVITZ 438-4321, for defendant Sotheby's Inc. moving for order discharging defendant Stakeholder from liability and awarding costs and fees and for dismissal
Geoffrey M. Faust, Esq. of 925/673-1988, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court ruled on DEFENDANT SOTHEBY'S INC.'S Motion For Order Discharging Deft Stakeholder From Liability Awarding Costs And Fees And Dismissal -- (1) The ring should be returned to S. F. and deposited with the Court. (2) Action stayed as to defendant Sotheby's Inc. (3) The ruling on defendant's request for attorney's fees and costs deferred until final judgment is entered. Defendant Sotheby's Inc. is to prepare an order. (PHA/301/DR) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
